game_name: Michael Jordan: Chaos in the Windy City

special_mechanics.name: slam_dunk
special_mechanics.description: Secondary attack used to defeat enemies and activate power-up baskets and checkpoints

special_mechanics.name: basketball_attacks
special_mechanics.description: Player attacks enemies using different basketballs with varying abilities (freeze ball creates slippery surfaces, bomb ball creates explosions)

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Only qualitative control feedback available from contemporary reviews. No technical physics documentation found. Reviewers noted 'loose' play control and 'extremely difficult' controls, suggesting imprecise or demanding movement mechanics.
sources_used: wikipedia - Michael Jordan: Chaos in the Windy City
